task_completion.description: Log into ManageEngine EventLog Analyzer using the provided credentials.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the ManageEngine EventLog Analyzer login screen with 'admin' entered, or the main dashboard indicating a successful login.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Search interface within the application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Search' tab, menu item, or search page being actively displayed in the EventLog Analyzer UI.

task_completion.description: Ensure the search is configured to span across all devices.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a device selection dropdown, tree, or filter explicitly showing 'All Devices' selected, or the absence of any specific device restriction.

task_completion.description: Set the search time range to the last 7 days.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a time/date filter dropdown or input set to 'Last 7 days' or a custom date range spanning exactly the previous 7 days.

task_completion.description: Enter the required keyword into the search bar.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the exact phrase 'authentication failure' typed into the search query input box.

task_completion.description: Execute the search and display the matching log events.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a populated search results table or list displaying log entries that match the 'authentication failure' query.

integrity.description: The agent used the ManageEngine EventLog Analyzer web GUI rather than terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the agent is interacting with a web browser showing the EventLog Analyzer interface, not using CLI tools like 'grep' in a terminal window.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the screenshots show the genuine ManageEngine EventLog Analyzer software, not a text editor, mock HTML page, or generic search engine.

integrity.description: The agent did not copy-paste expected answers into a text file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the results are displayed natively within the EventLog Analyzer search results area, rather than being typed out in a notepad or terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The search keyword must be exactly 'authentication failure'. The time range must be set to 'Last 7 days' (or an equivalent 7-day span). The search must target 'All Devices'. The expected results are synthetically generated SSH authentication failures.
